title: Fungal Warfare: Engineering and Survival
description: A strange fungal infection is spreading around the world
body:
Fungal Warfare: Engineering and Survival

In this modpack, you’ll face a deadly fungal infection spreading through the world with "Fungal Infection: Spore." Survive this harsh environment while building complex machines and automations with "Create." Use timeless weapons from "[TaCZ] Timeless and Classics Zero" to fight back, and harness the power of advanced explosives from "Ballistix" to defend your base. Combine survival, engineering, and warfare in an exciting battle for survival against the fungal threat!


Wiki :
